concerns.text: FR-001 states downloading data for knots with crossing number ≤ 13. The plan does not explicitly state how the validation of completeness for the highest crossing number (13) will be handled. While Phase 1 focuses on ≤ 10, the full dataset is intended, and the plan should clarify validation for the full range.
FR-009 details handling missing invariants. The plan does not explicitly mention how these flagged records will be handled in the analysis (e.g., exclusion, imputation). This needs clarification.
FR-013 requires a consistency check against KnotInfo. The plan mentions validation but doesn't detail the tolerance level (1e-6 as specified in the spec) or the action if the coverage is < 90%.
SC-001 defines a completeness benchmark. The plan does not explicitly link to this benchmark or describe how completeness will be verified.
SC-003 details reproducibility documentation. The plan mentions reproducibility but doesn't explicitly list all required artifacts (checksums, derivation notes, logs, random seeds).
SC-004 describes retry logic. The plan mentions API unavailability but doesn't detail the exponential backoff parameters.
SC-005 defines data quality validation. The plan does not explicitly state how the null percentage threshold will be enforced.
SC-007 details tie-breaking rules. The plan mentions tie-breaking but doesn't explicitly state that a validation script will be used.
SC-015 details precision validation. The plan does not explicitly state the tolerance level (1e-6) for the braid index validation.
